Instruction: Walk straight down the wide hallway with the polished stone floor, keeping the glass railing on your left. Continue straight past the frosted glass walls on your right. Walk past the elevators and restroom signs on your right wall. Keep going straight, passing the large glass elevator structure visible on your left. Stop in front of the grey double doors with narrow vertical windows on your right. The doors are set in a wall made of grey speckled stone tiles and have a small white card reader next to them. This is your destination.
